productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Red Tunic With Mirror Print Top
description: CompositionRed round neck tunic top made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, rouched dolman sleeves and huge placement prints on the hemlineWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitLook great during casual outings with friends in this red tunic top from jealous 21. The rouched dolman sleeves and viscose fabric give a beautiful liquid flow to the top and the huge placement graphics along the hemline make it look all the more interesting. This top teams best with black pants or leggings. Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.8", Chest-33"
